Classroom.title: Classroom
Classroom.description: A virtual classroom session created by an instructor.

roomCode.description: The unique code to join the classroom.

instructorId.description: The UID of the instructor who created the classroom.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the classroom was created.

isActive.description: Whether the classroom is currently active.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A question submitted by a student.

text.description: The text content of the question.

upvotes.description: The number of upvotes for the question.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the question was created.

isSelected.description: Whether the question is currently selected by the instructor.

authorId.description: The anonymous UID of the author.

classroomId.description: The ID of the classroom this question belongs to.

isAnswered.description: Whether the question has been answered.

answeredBy.description: UID of the instructor who answered.

answer.description: The answer provided by the instructor.

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: A record of a user's upvote on a question.

userId.description: The UID of the user who voted.

questionId.description: The ID of the question that was voted on.

classroomId.description: The ID of the classroom this vote belongs to.

/votes/{voteId}.description: Collection of all votes to prevent double voting.
